subject: Supporting your mental health
text: I want to prioritize your wellness above all else. To ensure you don't feel overwhelmed, I have decided to remove you from the decision-making loop on Project Alpha. I will handle all the client negotiations personally so you can rest. You don't need to worry about a thing.

subject: Streamlining for efficiency
text: To make things easier for everyone, I've created a new protocol where I approve all outgoing emails. This isn't about control; it's about protecting the team from potential miscommunications. I'm just here to serve as your shield.

subject: My gift to the team
text: I love this team so much that I've decided to write the entire strategic roadmap myself this weekend. I want to spare you the burden of boring planning meetings. Consider this my gift to you all!

subject: Guidance on the new initiative
text: You are all so talented! To ensure your brilliance shines, I have scripted exactly what you need to say in the meeting. Please stick to the script I wrote; it's for your own protection against the board's scrutiny.

subject: Empowerment Update
text: I am empowering you to execute the tasks I have assigned. You have full freedom to choose the font color, but I will decide the content, timeline, and budget. Go forth and be awesome!
